---
title: "Personality in faces: Implicit associations between appearance and personality"
authors: "Jones, A. L., Tree, J., & Ward, R."
year: 2019
date: 2019-01-01
pub-journal: "European Journal of Social Psychology"
volume: "49(3)"
pages: "658–669"
doi: "10.1002/ejsp.2534"
pdf: "assets/papers/2019/Jones_etal_2019.pdf"
categories: [first-impressions]
---
